meta.description: cc-factory tool backlog. Tools are built in order. Mark 'done' after deployment.

tools.name: 文字コード変換
tools.description: UTF-8, Shift_JIS, EUC-JP間の文字コード変換とエンコード確認
tools.spec: Input: テキスト入力 or ファイルアップロード. Output: 各文字コードでのバイト列(hex表示), 文字コード自動判定, 変換結果のコピー/ダウンロード. エンコード一覧: UTF-8, Shift_JIS, EUC-JP, ISO-2022-JP, UTF-16.

tools.name: 旧字体変換
tools.description: 新字体と旧字体を相互変換
tools.spec: Input: テキスト. Output: 新字体→旧字体 / 旧字体→新字体の双方向変換. 変換された文字をハイライト表示. 主要な新旧字体マッピング(500文字以上)を内蔵. コピーボタン.

tools.name: 敬語変換
tools.description: 普通語から敬語(尊敬語・謙譲語・丁寧語)への変換
tools.spec: Input: 普通の文章. Output: 尊敬語版, 謙譲語版, 丁寧語版の3パターン表示. 主要な動詞変換辞書(行く→いらっしゃる/参る, 食べる→召し上がる/いただく 等50組以上). ビジネスメール例文テンプレート付き.

tools.name: 縦書き変換
tools.description: 横書きテキストを縦書き表示に変換
tools.spec: Input: テキスト. Output: CSS writing-mode: vertical-rl での縦書きプレビュー. フォント選択(明朝/ゴシック), フォントサイズ調整, 行間調整. 画像としてダウンロード(canvas). 原稿用紙風表示モード.

tools.name: 年号早見表
tools.description: 西暦と年号(令和/平成/昭和/大正/明治)の一覧表
tools.spec: 明治元年(1868)〜現在までの全年号対応表. 検索: 西暦入力→年号表示, 年号入力→西暦表示. 各年の主な出来事(オプション). 年齢早見(その年生まれの人の現在年齢). 印刷用レイアウト.

tools.name: 体脂肪率計算
tools.description: 体脂肪率の推定計算と判定
tools.spec: Input: 性別, 年齢, 身長, 体重, ウエスト周囲径(Navy法). Output: 推定体脂肪率, 判定(やせ/標準-/標準+/軽肥満/肥満), 除脂肪体重, 体脂肪量. BMI連携表示. 判定基準表(男女別・年齢別).

tools.name: .gitignore Generator
tools.description: Generate .gitignore files for any project type
tools.spec: Searchable list of templates: Node.js, Python, Java, Go, Rust, Ruby, Swift, Kotlin, Unity, Unreal, macOS, Windows, Linux, JetBrains, VSCode, etc (50+ templates). Multi-select and combine. Preview generated file. Copy button. Templates based on github/gitignore repo patterns.

tools.name: License Generator
tools.description: Generate open source license files with your details
tools.spec: License selection: MIT, Apache 2.0, GPL v3, BSD 2/3-Clause, ISC, MPL 2.0, Unlicense, CC0, LGPL, AGPL. Input: author name, year. Output: formatted license text. Comparison table showing permissions/conditions/limitations. Copy and download buttons.

tools.name: cURL Converter
tools.description: Convert cURL commands to code in various languages
tools.spec: Input: cURL command string. Output: equivalent code in JavaScript(fetch), Python(requests), Go(net/http), PHP(curl), Ruby(net/http), Java(HttpClient), C#(HttpClient), Rust(reqwest). Parse headers, body, method, auth. Syntax highlighted output. Copy button per language.

tools.name: IP Subnet Calculator
tools.description: Calculate IP subnets, CIDR ranges, and network details
tools.spec: Input: IP address + subnet mask or CIDR notation. Output: network address, broadcast address, first/last usable host, number of hosts, wildcard mask, binary representation. Subnet table for common masks. IPv4 and IPv6 support. CIDR to range converter.

tools.name: CSV Viewer
tools.description: View and explore CSV files in a sortable table
tools.spec: Input: paste CSV or upload file. Output: interactive table with sort by column, search/filter, column resize. Auto-detect delimiter (comma, tab, semicolon, pipe). Row count, column count stats. Export filtered results. Handle large files (virtual scroll for 10K+ rows).

tools.name: .htaccess Generator
tools.description: Generate Apache .htaccess rules visually
tools.spec: Modules: redirects (301/302), rewrite rules, custom error pages, password protection, CORS headers, gzip compression, cache control, block IPs, force HTTPS, www redirect. Toggle each module on/off. Preview combined .htaccess output. Copy button. Validation warnings.

tools.name: Crontab Validator
tools.description: Validate and explain crontab expressions with next run times
tools.spec: Input: crontab expression (5 or 6 fields). Output: human-readable explanation, next 10 run times, validation errors. Visual cron builder as alternative input. Support for special strings (@hourly, @daily etc). Diff from existing cron-generator: this focuses on VALIDATION and explaining existing expressions, not building new ones.

tools.name: Docker Run Generator
tools.description: Build docker run commands with a visual interface
tools.spec: Visual form: image name, container name, ports (-p), volumes (-v), env vars (-e), network, restart policy, memory/cpu limits, entrypoint, command. Toggle: detached mode, remove on exit, privileged. Generate docker run command + equivalent docker-compose.yml. Copy both.

tools.name: README Generator
tools.description: Generate professional README.md files from a form
tools.spec: Form fields: project name, description, badges (npm/license/build), features list, installation steps, usage examples, tech stack, contributing guidelines, license. Toggle sections on/off. Live Markdown preview. Copy raw markdown. Multiple templates: minimal, standard, detailed.

tools.name: CSS Filter Generator
tools.description: Create CSS filter effects with a visual editor
tools.spec: Sliders: blur, brightness, contrast, grayscale, hue-rotate, invert, opacity, saturate, sepia, drop-shadow. Live preview on sample image (user can upload their own). Combined CSS filter output. Reset individual/all. Preset combinations (vintage, noir, warm, cool, etc). Copy CSS.

tools.name: SASS/SCSS to CSS
tools.description: Convert SASS/SCSS syntax to plain CSS
tools.spec: Input: SCSS or SASS (indented) code. Output: compiled CSS. Handle: nesting, variables, mixins, extends, math operations, color functions. Error highlighting for invalid syntax. Side-by-side input/output. Pure JS compilation (no server). Copy output.

tools.name: 数字漢字変換
tools.description: 数字を漢数字に変換（大字対応）
tools.spec: Input: 数字(例: 12345). Output: 通常漢数字(一万二千三百四十五), 大字(壱萬弐阡参百四拾伍), 位取り式(1万2345). 逆変換(漢数字→数字)も対応. 金額表示(金壱萬弐阡参百四拾伍円也). 領収書用フォーマット.

tools.name: 日本の伝統色
tools.description: 日本の伝統色一覧とカラーコード検索
tools.spec: 日本の伝統色200色以上: 色名(読み), HEX, RGB, 説明. 検索・フィルタ(色相別). カラーパレット表示. クリックでHEXコピー. 色名から最も近い伝統色を検索. 季節別・カテゴリ別表示(春/夏/秋/冬, 赤系/青系/緑系等).

tools.name: 日時変換
tools.description: Unixタイムスタンプと日本時間の相互変換
tools.spec: Input: Unixタイムスタンプ or 日付時刻. Output: JST日時, UTC日時, Unixタイムスタンプ(秒/ミリ秒), ISO 8601形式, 和暦表示. 現在時刻のタイムスタンプをワンクリック取得. 相対時間表示(○分前、○日後).

tools.name: QR Code Reader
tools.description: Read and decode QR codes from images
tools.spec: Input: upload image, paste from clipboard, or use camera. Output: decoded text/URL, QR code type. Support: QR Code, Data Matrix, Code 128, EAN-13. Use jsQR or similar pure-JS library approach (implement QR decoding in-browser). History of scanned codes. Copy result.

tools.name: JSONPath Tester
tools.description: Test JSONPath expressions against JSON data
tools.spec: Input: JSON data + JSONPath expression. Output: matched results highlighted. JSONPath syntax reference sidebar. Auto-complete suggestions. Example expressions. Tree view of JSON structure. Support standard JSONPath syntax ($, .., *, [], ?()).

tools.name: Side-by-Side Diff
tools.description: Visual side-by-side text comparison with syntax highlighting
tools.spec: Input: two text areas (original/modified). Output: side-by-side diff view with line-level and character-level highlighting. Unified diff view toggle. Line numbers. Stats (added/removed/changed lines). Copy diff as unified patch. Ignore whitespace option.

tools.name: SVG Optimizer
tools.description: Optimize and minify SVG files
tools.spec: Input: paste SVG code or upload file. Output: optimized SVG with size reduction %. Options: remove comments, remove metadata, remove empty attrs, minify paths, convert shapes to paths, remove dimensions. Before/after preview. Download optimized SVG. Based on SVGO-like optimization rules implemented in JS.

tools.name: Emoji Search
tools.description: Search and copy emojis by name or keyword
tools.spec: Searchable emoji database (Unicode 15+, 1800+ emojis). Categories: Smileys, People, Animals, Food, Travel, Activities, Objects, Symbols, Flags. Click to copy. Recently used section. Skin tone selector. Show emoji name, Unicode codepoint, shortcode (:smile:). Grid layout.

tools.name: JWT Generator
tools.description: Generate JSON Web Tokens with custom claims
tools.spec: Input: header (algorithm select: HS256/HS384/HS512/RS256), payload (JSON editor with common claims: iss, sub, aud, exp, iat, nbf), secret key. Output: encoded JWT, decoded preview. Set expiration with date picker. Quick-add standard claims. Copy token. Differs from jwt-decoder: this CREATES tokens.

tools.name: Password Strength Checker
tools.description: Check password strength and get improvement suggestions
tools.spec: Input: password field (with show/hide toggle). Output: strength score (0-100), strength label (Very Weak to Very Strong), visual bar, crack time estimate. Checks: length, uppercase, lowercase, numbers, symbols, common patterns, dictionary words, sequential chars. Suggestions for improvement. All client-side, no data sent.

tools.name: Unit Converter
tools.description: Convert between various units of measurement
tools.spec: Categories: Length, Weight, Temperature, Volume, Area, Speed, Data Size, Time, Pressure, Energy. Each category has 10+ units. Bidirectional conversion. Quick swap button. Common conversions highlighted. Formula display. Bookmark favorites.

tools.name: TOML Formatter
tools.description: Format, validate, and convert TOML files
tools.spec: Input: TOML text. Output: formatted/prettified TOML, validation results, TOML→JSON conversion, JSON→TOML conversion. Syntax error highlighting with line numbers. Tree view of parsed structure. Copy output.

tools.name: CSS Text Shadow
tools.description: Create CSS text-shadow effects with a visual editor
tools.spec: Sliders: offset-x, offset-y, blur-radius, color (with alpha). Multiple shadows support (add/remove layers). Live preview with custom text input. Font size/family adjustment. Presets: neon glow, 3D, retro, emboss, fire. Copy CSS text-shadow value.
